ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Continued To Jul-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Button, via Zoom, for Darred Greenside, Admnistrator.

Ms. Button advises that a petition for final distribution should be filed within one week. The court advises that it will continue this matter to allow the timely filing of a petition.

The subject matter is continued to Jul-24-2023 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-08-2023 Continued To Jun-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-29-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Button, via Zoom, for Darred Greenside, via Zoom, Petitioner; Dustin Greenside, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Dec-04-1985 is admitted to probate. Darred Greenside is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Shirley Yawitz remains probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May-08-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
